name: Daniel Aliaga
bio: Research in urban computing, computer graphics, and visual computing.

name: Adnan Firoze
bio: Adnan Firoze is a Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science at Purdue University, focusing on computer vision, graphics, machine learning, and satellite modeling. He earned his M.S. in Computer Science and Journalism from Columbia University.

name: Aocheng Li
bio: Aocheng Li is a Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science at Purdue University. His research focuses on 3D reconstruction and point cloud completion, with applications to archaeological site restoration.

name: Tanner Waltz
bio: Tanner Waltz is a Ph.D. student at Purdue University. His research focuses on the intersection of Computer Vision and Machine Learning, with an emphasis on applications in urban planning and design. His current projects explore the use of large language models to enhance, edit, and design urban block layouts. Before attending Purdue, Tanner earned a B.S. in Computer Science and a Supplemental Major in Applied and Computational Mathematics and Statistics from the University of Notre Dame.

name: Ruiqi Xu
bio: Ruiqi is a PhD student in the Department of Computer Science at Purdue University. His interests focus on 3D/4D/video generative modeling. Ruiqi got his M.S. in Computer Science at Brown University, and his B.S. in Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, and Economics at Tufts University.

name: Baris Tezcan
bio: Baris Sarper Tezcan is a Ph.D. student at Purdue University. He completed a double major in Computer Engineering and Mathematics at Middle East Technical University, Turkey.

name: Zirui Zhang
bio: Zirui Zhang is an M.S. student in Computer Science at Purdue University. He earned his B.S. in Computer Science from Purdue University.

name: Sashank Silwal
bio: Sashank Silwal is an M.S. student in Computer Science at Purdue University. He holds a B.S. in Computer Science from NYU Abu Dhabi, with minors in Applied Mathematics and Interactive Media.
